chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. D- 2942 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Zahid Hussain Mallah, advocate for petitioner Mr. Shaukat Ali Pathan, advocate for respondents Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Asstt: A.G. The main grievance of the petitioner is that the official respondents at the behest of private respondents are harassing the petitioner without any justification. The official respondents have filed their written replies which are taken on record copy whereof supplied to the counsel for petitioner. During the course of arguments learned counsel for petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this petition if appropriate directions are given to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of along with listed applications with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
